content.text:
ther are still remaining issues. fix the maccordigly. Add ownership validation in ManageLearningPlanUseCase.kt for transitionStatus and duplicateForEditing — resolve the plan owner first and enforce checkObjectOwnership before allowing the mutation, preventing one user from modifying another user's learning plan by ID.
Add an ownership check in the ticket evidence upload path in ManageTicketUseCase.kt — resolve the ticket before inserting evidence and enforce that the calling end user owns the ticket (allow agent/admin exceptions per policy).
Add actor context and ownership enforcement to messaging read/update methods in ManageMessagingUseCase.kt — pass the current user ID into get/mark APIs and verify ownership or privileged role before executing repository calls.
Remove the hardcoded static encryption key fallback in AppConfig.kt and DatabaseModule.kt — derive a per-install key from Android Keystore instead, and fail safely if the Keystore is unavailable.
Add negative authorization tests covering the object-level gaps: cross-user learning plan transition/duplication, cross-user ticket evidence upload, and cross-user message read/mark. These should seed real resources for two users and assert that user A cannot access or mutate user B's data.
Update README.md to add a top-level static-audit note with a non-Docker primary verification path, so reviewers following an offline/no-Docker workflow aren't misled.
Let me start by finding all the relevant files and understanding the current code.

1	package com.nutriops.app.domain.usecase.learningplan
2	
3	import com.nutriops.app.data.repository.LearningPlanRepository
4	import com.nutriops.app.domain.model.LearningPlanStatus
5	import com.nutriops.app.domain.model.Role
6	import com.nutriops.app.security.RbacManager
7	import java.time.LocalDate
8	import javax.inject.Inject
9	
10	/**
11	 * Learning Plan lifecycle management with:
12	 * - Status transition matrix enforcement
13	 * - Confirmation requirement on status changes
14	 * - Duplicate-before-edit for completed plans
15	 * - Frequency constraint validation (1-7 days/week)
16	 * - Date validation (end >= start)
17	 */
18	class ManageLearningPlanUseCase @Inject constructor(
19	    private val learningPlanRepository: LearningPlanRepository
20	) {
21	    suspend fun createPlan(
22	        userId: String,
23	        title: String,
24	        description: String,
25	        startDate: String,
26	        endDate: String,
27	        frequencyPerWeek: Int,
28	        actorId: String,
29	        actorRole: Role
30	    ): Result<String> {
31	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.CREATE_LEARNING_PLAN)
32	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
33	        RbacManager.checkObjectOwnership(actorId, userId, actorRole)
34	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
35	
36	        if (title.isBlank()) {
37	            return Result.failure(IllegalArgumentException("Title is required"))
38	        }
39	        if (frequencyPerWeek !in 1..7) {
40	            return Result.failure(IllegalArgumentException("Frequency must be between 1 and 7 days/week"))
41	        }
42	        try {
43	            val start = LocalDate.parse(startDate)
44	            val end = LocalDate.parse(endDate)
45	            if (end.isBefore(start)) {
46	                return Result.failure(IllegalArgumentException("End date cannot be earlier than start date"))
47	            }
48	        } catch (e: Exception) {
49	            return Result.failure(IllegalArgumentException("Invalid date format: use YYYY-MM-DD"))
50	        }
51	
52	        return learningPlanRepository.createLearningPlan(
53	            userId, title, description, startDate, endDate,
54	            frequencyPerWeek.toLong(), actorId, actorRole
55	        )
56	    }
57	
58	    /**
59	     * Transition with status matrix enforcement.
60	     * Valid transitions:
61	     * NOT_STARTED -> IN_PROGRESS
62	     * IN_PROGRESS -> PAUSED | COMPLETED
63	     * PAUSED -> IN_PROGRESS | COMPLETED
64	     * COMPLETED -> ARCHIVED
65	     */
66	    suspend fun transitionStatus(
67	        planId: String,
68	        newStatus: LearningPlanStatus,
69	        actorId: String,
70	        actorRole: Role
71	    ): Result<Unit> {
72	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.TRANSITION_LEARNING_PLAN)
73	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
74	
75	        return learningPlanRepository.transitionStatus(planId, newStatus, actorId, actorRole)
76	    }
77	
78	    /**
79	     * Completed plans cannot be edited; they must be duplicated first.
80	     * Returns the new plan ID.
81	     */
82	    suspend fun duplicateForEditing(
83	        planId: String,
84	        actorId: String,
85	        actorRole: Role
86	    ): Result<String> {
87	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.DUPLICATE_LEARNING_PLAN)
88	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
89	
90	        return learningPlanRepository.duplicatePlan(planId, actorId, actorRole)
91	    }
92	
93	    suspend fun getPlans(userId: String, actorId: String, actorRole: Role) =
94	        learningPlanRepository.getLearningPlansByUserId(userId)
95	
96	    suspend fun getPlanById(planId: String) =
97	        learningPlanRepository.getLearningPlanById(planId)
98	
99	    /**
100	     * Returns allowed transitions from the current status
101	     */
102	    fun getAllowedTransitions(currentStatus: LearningPlanStatus): Set<LearningPlanStatus> =
103	        currentStatus.allowedTransitions()
104	}
105

1	package com.nutriops.app.domain.usecase.ticket
2	
3	import com.nutriops.app.data.repository.MessageRepository
4	import com.nutriops.app.data.repository.TicketRepository
5	import com.nutriops.app.domain.model.*
6	import com.nutriops.app.security.RbacManager
7	import javax.inject.Inject
8	
9	/**
10	 * Complete ticket lifecycle management:
11	 * - Create delay/dispute/lost-item tickets
12	 * - SLA clock management (4 business hour first response, 3 day resolution)
13	 * - Evidence upload (image/text only)
14	 * - Compensation suggestion with auto-approve threshold ($10)
15	 * - Agent approval workflow for amounts above threshold
16	 * - Status transition enforcement
17	 */
18	class ManageTicketUseCase @Inject constructor(
19	    private val ticketRepository: TicketRepository,
20	    private val messageRepository: MessageRepository
21	) {
22	    suspend fun createTicket(
23	        userId: String,
24	        ticketType: TicketType,
25	        priority: TicketPriority,
26	        subject: String,
27	        description: String,
28	        actorId: String,
29	        actorRole: Role
30	    ): Result<String> {
31	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.CREATE_TICKET)
32	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
33	
34	        if (subject.isBlank()) {
35	            return Result.failure(IllegalArgumentException("Subject is required"))
36	        }
37	
38	        val result = ticketRepository.createTicket(userId, ticketType, priority, subject, description, actorId, actorRole)
39	
40	        // Trigger message on ticket creation
41	        result.onSuccess { ticketId ->
42	            messageRepository.sendMessage(
43	                userId = userId,
44	                templateId = null,
45	                title = "Ticket Created: $subject",
46	                body = "Your ${ticketType.name.lowercase()} ticket has been created. We'll respond within 4 business hours.",
47	                messageType = MessageType.NOTIFICATION.name,
48	                triggerEvent = TriggerEvent.TICKET_CREATED.key
49	            )
50	        }
51	
52	        return result
53	    }
54	
55	    suspend fun assignToAgent(
56	        ticketId: String,
57	        agentId: String,
58	        actorId: String,
59	        actorRole: Role
60	    ): Result<Unit> {
61	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.ASSIGN_TICKET)
62	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
63	
64	        return ticketRepository.assignTicket(ticketId, agentId, actorId, actorRole)
65	    }
66	
67	    suspend fun transitionStatus(
68	        ticketId: String,
69	        newStatus: TicketStatus,
70	        actorId: String,
71	        actorRole: Role
72	    ): Result<Unit> {
73	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.MANAGE_TICKETS)
74	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
75	
76	        val result = ticketRepository.transitionTicketStatus(ticketId, newStatus, actorId, actorRole)
77	
78	        // Send notification on status changes
79	        result.onSuccess {
80	            val ticket = ticketRepository.getTicketById(ticketId)
81	            if (ticket != null) {
82	                messageRepository.sendMessage(
83	                    userId = ticket.userId,
84	                    templateId = null,
85	                    title = "Ticket Updated",
86	                    body = "Your ticket '${ticket.subject}' status changed to ${newStatus.name}.",
87	                    messageType = MessageType.NOTIFICATION.name,
88	                    triggerEvent = TriggerEvent.TICKET_UPDATED.key
89	                )
90	            }
91	        }
92	
93	        return result
94	    }
95	
96	    suspend fun addEvidence(
97	        ticketId: String,
98	        evidenceType: EvidenceType,
99	        contentUri: String?,
100	        textContent: String?,
101	        uploadedBy: String,
102	        fileSizeBytes: Long?,
103	        actorRole: Role
104	    ): Result<String> {
105	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.UPLOAD_EVIDENCE)
106	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
107	
108	        // Enforce image/text only
109	        if (evidenceType != EvidenceType.IMAGE && evidenceType != EvidenceType.TEXT) {
110	            return Result.failure(IllegalArgumentException("Only image and text evidence are supported"))
111	        }
112	
113	        return ticketRepository.addEvidence(ticketId, evidenceType, contentUri, textContent, uploadedBy, fileSizeBytes, actorRole)
114	    }
115	
116	    suspend fun suggestCompensation(
117	        ticketId: String,
118	        amount: Double,
119	        actorId: String,
120	        actorRole: Role
121	    ): Result<Unit> {
122	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.SUGGEST_COMPENSATION)
123	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
124	
125	        return ticketRepository.suggestCompensation(ticketId, amount, actorId, actorRole)
126	    }
127	
128	    suspend fun approveCompensation(
129	        ticketId: String,
130	        approvedAmount: Double,
131	        actorId: String,
132	        actorRole: Role
133	    ): Result<Unit> {
134	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.APPROVE_COMPENSATION)
135	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
136	
137	        val result = ticketRepository.approveCompensation(ticketId, approvedAmount, actorId, actorRole)
138	
139	        result.onSuccess {
140	            val ticket = ticketRepository.getTicketById(ticketId)
141	            if (ticket != null) {
142	                messageRepository.sendMessage(
143	                    userId = ticket.userId,
144	                    templateId = null,
145	                    title = "Compensation Approved",
146	                    body = "A compensation of \$$approvedAmount has been approved for your ticket.",
147	                    messageType = MessageType.NOTIFICATION.name,
148	                    triggerEvent = TriggerEvent.COMPENSATION_APPROVED.key
149	                )
150	            }
151	        }
152	
153	        return result
154	    }
155	
156	    suspend fun pauseSla(ticketId: String, actorId: String, actorRole: Role): Result<Unit> {
157	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.MANAGE_TICKETS)
158	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
159	        return ticketRepository.pauseSla(ticketId, actorId, actorRole)
160	    }
161	
162	    suspend fun resumeSla(ticketId: String, pauseMinutes: Long, actorId: String, actorRole: Role): Result<Unit> {
163	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.MANAGE_TICKETS)
164	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
165	        return ticketRepository.resumeSla(ticketId, pauseMinutes, actorId, actorRole)
166	    }
167	
168	    suspend fun getTicketDetails(
169	        ticketId: String, actorId: String, actorRole: Role
170	    ): com.nutriops.app.data.local.Tickets? {
171	        val ticket = ticketRepository.getTicketById(ticketId) ?: return null
172	        if (actorRole == Role.END_USER) {
173	            RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.VIEW_OWN_TICKETS)
174	                .getOrElse { return null }
175	            RbacManager.checkObjectOwnership(actorId, ticket.userId, actorRole)
176	                .getOrElse { return null }
177	        } else {
178	            RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.VIEW_ALL_TICKETS)
179	                .getOrElse { return null }
180	        }
181	        return ticket
182	    }
183	
184	    suspend fun getTicketsByUser(
185	        userId: String, actorId: String, actorRole: Role
186	    ): List<com.nutriops.app.data.local.Tickets> {
187	        if (actorRole == Role.END_USER) {
188	            RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.VIEW_OWN_TICKETS)
189	                .getOrElse { return emptyList() }
190	            RbacManager.checkObjectOwnership(actorId, userId, actorRole)
191	                .getOrElse { return emptyList() }
192	        } else {
193	            RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.VIEW_ALL_TICKETS)
194	                .getOrElse { return emptyList() }
195	        }
196	        return ticketRepository.getTicketsByUserId(userId)
197	    }
198	
199	    suspend fun getTicketsForAgent(
200	        agentId: String, actorId: String, actorRole: Role
201	    ): List<com.nutriops.app.data.local.Tickets> {
202	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.VIEW_ALL_TICKETS)
203	            .getOrElse { return emptyList() }
204	        return ticketRepository.getTicketsByAgentId(agentId)
205	    }
206	
207	    suspend fun getOpenTickets(actorRole: Role): List<com.nutriops.app.data.local.Tickets> {
208	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.VIEW_ALL_TICKETS)
209	            .getOrElse { return emptyList() }
210	        return ticketRepository.getOpenTickets()
211	    }
212	
213	    suspend fun getEvidence(
214	        ticketId: String, actorId: String, actorRole: Role
215	    ): List<com.nutriops.app.data.local.EvidenceItems> {
216	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.VIEW_EVIDENCE)
217	            .getOrElse {
218	                // End users can view evidence on their own tickets
219	                if (actorRole == Role.END_USER) {
220	                    val ticket = ticketRepository.getTicketById(ticketId) ?: return emptyList()
221	                    RbacManager.checkObjectOwnership(actorId, ticket.userId, actorRole)
222	                        .getOrElse { return emptyList() }
223	                } else {
224	                    return emptyList()
225	                }
226	            }
227	        return ticketRepository.getEvidenceByTicketId(ticketId)
228	    }
229	
230	    fun getAllowedTransitions(currentStatus: TicketStatus): Set<TicketStatus> =
231	        currentStatus.allowedTransitions()
232	}

1	package com.nutriops.app.domain.usecase.messaging
2	
3	import com.nutriops.app.data.repository.MessageRepository
4	import com.nutriops.app.domain.model.MessageType
5	import com.nutriops.app.domain.model.Role
6	import com.nutriops.app.domain.model.TriggerEvent
7	import com.nutriops.app.security.RbacManager
8	import javax.inject.Inject
9	
10	/**
11	 * In-app messaging and reminder management:
12	 * - Trigger-based messages (plan started, ticket updated, rule rollout, etc.)
13	 * - Template variables substitution
14	 * - Quiet hours enforcement (9:00 PM - 7:00 AM)
15	 * - Daily reminder cap (max 3 per day)
16	 * - In-app only (email/SMS/WeCom disabled in offline mode)
17	 */
18	class ManageMessagingUseCase @Inject constructor(
19	    private val messageRepository: MessageRepository
20	) {
21	    /**
22	     * Send a triggered message by resolving the template and substituting variables.
23	     */
24	    suspend fun sendTriggeredMessage(
25	        userId: String,
26	        triggerEvent: TriggerEvent,
27	        variables: Map<String, String>
28	    ): Result<String> {
29	        val templates = messageRepository.getTemplateByTrigger(triggerEvent.key)
30	        if (templates.isEmpty()) {
31	            // No template configured; send a default message
32	            val title = "Notification: ${triggerEvent.key.replace("_", " ").replaceFirstChar { it.uppercase() }}"
33	            val body = variables.entries.joinToString(". ") { "${it.key}: ${it.value}" }
34	            return messageRepository.sendMessage(
35	                userId, null, title, body, MessageType.NOTIFICATION.name, triggerEvent.key
36	            )
37	        }
38	
39	        val template = templates.first()
40	        val resolvedTitle = resolveTemplate(template.titleTemplate, variables)
41	        val resolvedBody = resolveTemplate(template.bodyTemplate, variables)
42	
43	        return messageRepository.sendMessage(
44	            userId, template.id, resolvedTitle, resolvedBody,
45	            MessageType.NOTIFICATION.name, triggerEvent.key
46	        )
47	    }
48	
49	    suspend fun sendDirectMessage(
50	        userId: String,
51	        title: String,
52	        body: String,
53	        messageType: MessageType,
54	        actorRole: Role
55	    ): Result<String> {
56	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.SEND_MESSAGES)
57	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
58	
59	        return messageRepository.sendMessage(
60	            userId, null, title, body, messageType.name, ""
61	        )
62	    }
63	
64	    suspend fun scheduleReminder(
65	        userId: String,
66	        title: String,
67	        scheduledAt: String,
68	        messageId: String?
69	    ): Result<String> {
70	        return messageRepository.scheduleReminder(userId, messageId, title, scheduledAt)
71	    }
72	
73	    suspend fun deliverPendingReminders(beforeTime: String): List<Pair<String, String>> {
74	        val pending = messageRepository.getPendingReminders(beforeTime)
75	        val results = mutableListOf<Pair<String, String>>()
76	
77	        for (reminder in pending) {
78	            val result = messageRepository.deliverReminder(reminder.id)
79	            result.onSuccess { status ->
80	                results.add(reminder.id to status.name)
81	            }
82	        }
83	
84	        return results
85	    }
86	
87	    suspend fun getMessages(userId: String) = messageRepository.getMessagesByUserId(userId)
88	    suspend fun getUnreadMessages(userId: String) = messageRepository.getUnreadMessages(userId)
89	    suspend fun getUnreadCount(userId: String) = messageRepository.getUnreadCount(userId)
90	    suspend fun markAsRead(messageId: String) = messageRepository.markAsRead(messageId)
91	    suspend fun markAllAsRead(userId: String) = messageRepository.markAllAsRead(userId)
92	
93	    // ── Todos ──
94	    suspend fun createTodo(
95	        userId: String, title: String, description: String,
96	        dueDate: String?, relatedEntityType: String?, relatedEntityId: String?
97	    ) = messageRepository.createTodo(userId, title, description, dueDate, relatedEntityType, relatedEntityId)
98	
99	    suspend fun completeTodo(todoId: String) = messageRepository.completeTodo(todoId)
100	    suspend fun getTodos(userId: String) = messageRepository.getTodosByUserId(userId)
101	    suspend fun getIncompleteTodos(userId: String) = messageRepository.getIncompleteTodos(userId)
102	
103	    // ── Templates ──
104	    suspend fun createTemplate(
105	        name: String, titleTemplate: String, bodyTemplate: String,
106	        variablesJson: String, triggerEvent: String
107	    ) = messageRepository.createTemplate(name, titleTemplate, bodyTemplate, variablesJson, triggerEvent)
108	
109	    suspend fun getAllTemplates() = messageRepository.getAllTemplates()
110	
111	    /**
112	     * Resolve template variables: {{variableName}} -> value
113	     */
114	    private fun resolveTemplate(template: String, variables: Map<String, String>): String {
115	        var resolved = template
116	        for ((key, value) in variables) {
117	            resolved = resolved.replace("{{$key}}", value)
118	        }
119	        return resolved
120	    }
121	}

1	package com.nutriops.app.config
2	
3	import android.content.Context
4	import com.nutriops.app.logging.AppLogger
5	
6	/**
7	 * Single source of truth for all application configuration.
8	 * All configuration values are centralized here — application logic must never
9	 * access system properties or environment variables directly.
10	 */
11	object AppConfig {
12	
13	    // Database
14	    const val DB_NAME = "nutriops.db"
15	    val DB_ENCRYPTION_KEY: String
16	        get() = configValues["DB_ENCRYPTION_KEY"] ?: "nutriops-secure-local-key-v1"
17	
18	    // TLS Toggle (per guide requirement)
19	    val ENABLE_TLS: Boolean
20	        get() = configValues["ENABLE_TLS"]?.toBooleanStrictOrNull() ?: false
21	
22	    // Authentication
23	    val MAX_LOGIN_ATTEMPTS: Int
24	        get() = configValues["MAX_LOGIN_ATTEMPTS"]?.toIntOrNull() ?: 5
25	    val LOCKOUT_DURATION_MINUTES: Long
26	        get() = configValues["LOCKOUT_DURATION_MINUTES"]?.toLongOrNull() ?: 30L
27	
28	    // SLA Configuration
29	    val SLA_FIRST_RESPONSE_HOURS: Int
30	        get() = configValues["SLA_FIRST_RESPONSE_HOURS"]?.toIntOrNull() ?: 4
31	    val SLA_RESOLUTION_DAYS: Int
32	        get() = configValues["SLA_RESOLUTION_DAYS"]?.toIntOrNull() ?: 3
33	
34	    // Messaging / Quiet Hours
35	    val QUIET_HOURS_START: String
36	        get() = configValues["QUIET_HOURS_START"] ?: "21:00"
37	    val QUIET_HOURS_END: String
38	        get() = configValues["QUIET_HOURS_END"] ?: "07:00"
39	    val MAX_REMINDERS_PER_DAY: Int
40	        get() = configValues["MAX_REMINDERS_PER_DAY"]?.toIntOrNull() ?: 3
41	
42	    // Canary Rollout
43	    val CANARY_PERCENTAGE: Int
44	        get() = configValues["CANARY_PERCENTAGE"]?.toIntOrNull() ?: 10
45	
46	    // Image / Memory
47	    val IMAGE_LRU_CACHE_MB: Int
48	        get() = configValues["IMAGE_LRU_CACHE_MB"]?.toIntOrNull() ?: 20
49	    const val IMAGE_MAX_DIMENSION_PX = 1920
50	    const val IMAGE_QUALITY = 85
51	
52	    // Compensation
53	    val COMPENSATION_AUTO_APPROVE_MAX: Double
54	        get() = configValues["COMPENSATION_AUTO_APPROVE_MAX"]?.toDoubleOrNull() ?: 10.0
55	    const val COMPENSATION_MIN = 3.0
56	    const val COMPENSATION_MAX = 20.0
57	
58	    // Meal Swap Tolerances
59	    const val SWAP_CALORIE_TOLERANCE_PERCENT = 10.0
60	    const val SWAP_PROTEIN_TOLERANCE_GRAMS = 5.0
61	
62	    // Learning Plan
63	    const val MAX_FREQUENCY_PER_WEEK = 7
64	
65	    // Rules Engine
66	    const val HYSTERESIS_DEFAULT_ENTER = 80.0
67	    const val HYSTERESIS_DEFAULT_EXIT = 90.0
68	    const val MIN_DURATION_DEFAULT_MINUTES = 10
69	
70	    // Coupon Limits
71	    const val DEFAULT_MAX_COUPONS_PER_USER = 2
72	    const val DEFAULT_COUPON_PERIOD_DAYS = 30
73	
74	    // Logging
75	    val LOG_LEVEL: String
76	        get() = configValues["LOG_LEVEL"] ?: "DEBUG"
77	    val LOG_REDACTION_ENABLED: Boolean
78	        get() = configValues["LOG_REDACTION_ENABLED"]?.toBooleanStrictOrNull() ?: true
79	
80	    // Audit
81	    val AUDIT_APPEND_ONLY: Boolean
82	        get() = configValues["AUDIT_APPEND_ONLY"]?.toBooleanStrictOrNull() ?: true
83	
84	    // Business Calendar (weekdays only for SLA)
85	    val SLA_BUSINESS_DAYS: List<Int>
86	        get() = listOf(1, 2, 3, 4, 5) // Monday to Friday
87	
88	    val SLA_BUSINESS_HOUR_START: Int get() = 9  // 9 AM
89	    val SLA_BUSINESS_HOUR_END: Int get() = 18   // 6 PM
90	
91	    private val configValues = mutableMapOf<String, String>()
92	
93	    fun initialize(context: Context) {
94	        // 1. Load from environment variables (Docker/CI environments)
95	        loadFromEnvironment()
96	
97	        // 2. Load from AndroidManifest <meta-data> (production builds)
98	        loadFromMetadata(context)
99	
100	        AppLogger.info("Config", "AppConfig initialized with ${configValues.size} overrides from env/metadata")
101	    }
102	
103	    private fun loadFromEnvironment() {
104	        val envKeys = listOf(
105	            "DB_ENCRYPTION_KEY", "ENABLE_TLS", "MAX_LOGIN_ATTEMPTS",
106	            "LOCKOUT_DURATION_MINUTES", "SLA_FIRST_RESPONSE_HOURS",
107	            "SLA_RESOLUTION_DAYS", "QUIET_HOURS_START", "QUIET_HOURS_END",
108	            "MAX_REMINDERS_PER_DAY", "CANARY_PERCENTAGE", "IMAGE_LRU_CACHE_MB",
109	            "COMPENSATION_AUTO_APPROVE_MAX", "LOG_LEVEL", "LOG_REDACTION_ENABLED",
110	            "AUDIT_APPEND_ONLY"
111	        )
112	        for (key in envKeys) {
113	            val value = System.getenv(key)
114	            if (value != null) {
115	                configValues[key] = value
116	            }
117	        }
118	    }
119	
120	    private fun loadFromMetadata(context: Context) {
121	        try {
122	            val appInfo = context.packageManager.getApplicationInfo(
123	                context.packageName, android.content.pm.PackageManager.GET_META_DATA
124	            )
125	            val metaData = appInfo.metaData ?: return
126	            for (key in metaData.keySet()) {
127	                val value = metaData.getString(key)
128	                if (value != null && !configValues.containsKey(key)) {
129	                    configValues[key] = value
130	                }
131	            }
132	        } catch (e: Exception) {
133	            AppLogger.warn("Config", "Could not load metadata: ${e.message}")
134	        }
135	    }
136	
137	    fun setForTesting(key: String, value: String) {
138	        configValues[key] = value
139	    }
140	
141	    fun clearTestOverrides() {
142	        configValues.clear()
143	    }
144	}

1	package com.nutriops.app.security
2	
3	import com.nutriops.app.domain.model.Role
4	import com.nutriops.app.logging.AppLogger
5	
6	/**
7	 * Role-Based Access Control enforcement.
8	 *
9	 * Permission matrix:
10	 * - ADMINISTRATOR: full config, rules, rollouts, user management, audit read
11	 * - AGENT: ticket management, evidence review, PII reveal, compensation workflow, audit read
12	 * - END_USER: own profile, own meal plans, own learning plans, own messages/todos, own tickets (create)
13	 *
14	 * Object-level authorization: users can only access their own data (BOLA/IDOR protection).
15	 */
16	object RbacManager {
17	
18	    enum class Permission {
19	        // User management
20	        MANAGE_USERS,
21	        VIEW_ALL_USERS,
22	
23	        // Profile
24	        VIEW_OWN_PROFILE,
25	        EDIT_OWN_PROFILE,
26	        VIEW_ANY_PROFILE,
27	
28	        // Meal plans
29	        VIEW_OWN_MEAL_PLANS,
30	        CREATE_MEAL_PLAN,
31	        SWAP_MEAL,
32	        VIEW_ANY_MEAL_PLANS,
33	
34	        // Learning plans
35	        VIEW_OWN_LEARNING_PLANS,
36	        CREATE_LEARNING_PLAN,
37	        TRANSITION_LEARNING_PLAN,
38	        DUPLICATE_LEARNING_PLAN,
39	        VIEW_ANY_LEARNING_PLANS,
40	
41	        // Config & Operations
42	        MANAGE_CONFIG,
43	        MANAGE_HOMEPAGE_MODULES,
44	        MANAGE_AD_SLOTS,
45	        MANAGE_CAMPAIGNS,
46	        MANAGE_COUPONS,
47	        MANAGE_BLACKWHITELIST,
48	        MANAGE_PURCHASE_LIMITS,
49	        MANAGE_ROLLOUTS,
50	
51	        // Rules
52	        MANAGE_RULES,
53	        VIEW_RULES,
54	        EVALUATE_RULES,
55	        BACK_CALCULATE,
56	
57	        // Tickets
58	        CREATE_TICKET,
59	        VIEW_OWN_TICKETS,
60	        VIEW_ALL_TICKETS,
61	        MANAGE_TICKETS,
62	        ASSIGN_TICKET,
63	        RESOLVE_TICKET,
64	
65	        // Evidence
66	        UPLOAD_EVIDENCE,
67	        VIEW_EVIDENCE,
68	
69	        // Compensation
70	        SUGGEST_COMPENSATION,
71	        APPROVE_COMPENSATION,
72	
73	        // PII
74	        REVEAL_PII,
75	
76	        // Messaging
77	        VIEW_OWN_MESSAGES,
78	        MANAGE_TEMPLATES,
79	        SEND_MESSAGES,
80	
81	        // Audit
82	        VIEW_AUDIT_TRAIL,
83	
84	        // Metrics
85	        VIEW_METRICS,
86	        VIEW_OWN_METRICS,
87	    }
88	
89	    private val rolePermissions: Map<Role, Set<Permission>> = mapOf(
90	        Role.ADMINISTRATOR to setOf(
91	            Permission.MANAGE_USERS,
92	            Permission.VIEW_ALL_USERS,
93	            Permission.VIEW_ANY_PROFILE,
94	            Permission.VIEW_ANY_MEAL_PLANS,
95	            Permission.VIEW_ANY_LEARNING_PLANS,
96	            Permission.MANAGE_CONFIG,
97	            Permission.MANAGE_HOMEPAGE_MODULES,
98	            Permission.MANAGE_AD_SLOTS,
99	            Permission.MANAGE_CAMPAIGNS,
100	            Permission.MANAGE_COUPONS,
101	            Permission.MANAGE_BLACKWHITELIST,
102	            Permission.MANAGE_PURCHASE_LIMITS,
103	            Permission.MANAGE_ROLLOUTS,
104	            Permission.MANAGE_RULES,
105	            Permission.VIEW_RULES,
106	            Permission.EVALUATE_RULES,
107	            Permission.BACK_CALCULATE,
108	            Permission.VIEW_ALL_TICKETS,
109	            Permission.VIEW_EVIDENCE,
110	            Permission.MANAGE_TEMPLATES,
111	            Permission.SEND_MESSAGES,
112	            Permission.VIEW_AUDIT_TRAIL,
113	            Permission.VIEW_METRICS,
114	        ),
115	        Role.AGENT to setOf(
116	            Permission.VIEW_OWN_PROFILE,
117	            Permission.VIEW_ANY_PROFILE,
118	            Permission.VIEW_ALL_TICKETS,
119	            Permission.MANAGE_TICKETS,
120	            Permission.ASSIGN_TICKET,
121	            Permission.RESOLVE_TICKET,
122	            Permission.VIEW_EVIDENCE,
123	            Permission.SUGGEST_COMPENSATION,
124	            Permission.APPROVE_COMPENSATION,
125	            Permission.REVEAL_PII,
126	            Permission.VIEW_AUDIT_TRAIL,
127	            Permission.VIEW_RULES,
128	            Permission.VIEW_METRICS,
129	            Permission.VIEW_OWN_MESSAGES,
130	        ),
131	        Role.END_USER to setOf(
132	            Permission.VIEW_OWN_PROFILE,
133	            Permission.EDIT_OWN_PROFILE,
134	            Permission.VIEW_OWN_MEAL_PLANS,
135	            Permission.CREATE_MEAL_PLAN,
136	            Permission.SWAP_MEAL,
137	            Permission.VIEW_OWN_LEARNING_PLANS,
138	            Permission.CREATE_LEARNING_PLAN,
139	            Permission.TRANSITION_LEARNING_PLAN,
140	            Permission.DUPLICATE_LEARNING_PLAN,
141	            Permission.CREATE_TICKET,
142	            Permission.VIEW_OWN_TICKETS,
143	            Permission.UPLOAD_EVIDENCE,
144	            Permission.VIEW_OWN_MESSAGES,
145	            Permission.VIEW_OWN_METRICS,
146	        )
147	    )
148	
149	    fun hasPermission(role: Role, permission: Permission): Boolean {
150	        return rolePermissions[role]?.contains(permission) == true
151	    }
152	
153	    fun checkPermission(role: Role, permission: Permission): Result<Unit> {
154	        return if (hasPermission(role, permission)) {
155	            Result.success(Unit)
156	        } else {
157	            AppLogger.warn("RBAC", "Permission denied: role=$role permission=$permission")
158	            Result.failure(SecurityException("Permission denied: ${permission.name} not granted to role ${role.name}"))
159	        }
160	    }
161	
162	    fun checkObjectOwnership(actorId: String, ownerId: String, role: Role): Result<Unit> {
163	        // Administrators and Agents with appropriate permissions can access any object
164	        if (role == Role.ADMINISTRATOR) return Result.success(Unit)
165	        if (role == Role.AGENT) return Result.success(Unit) // Agents have cross-user ticket access
166	
167	        return if (actorId == ownerId) {
168	            Result.success(Unit)
169	        } else {
170	            AppLogger.warn("RBAC", "Object-level authorization failed: actor=$actorId owner=$ownerId")
171	            Result.failure(SecurityException("Object-level authorization failed: cannot access another user's data"))
172	        }
173	    }
174	
175	    fun getPermissionsForRole(role: Role): Set<Permission> {
176	        return rolePermissions[role] ?: emptySet()
177	    }
178	}
179

4	import com.nutriops.app.data.repository.*
5	import com.nutriops.app.domain.model.*

14	import org.junit.Before

16	
17	/**
18	 * Integration tests verifying RBAC enforcement across viewmodel/usecase paths per role.
19	 * Cross-role and cross-user access must be denied.
20	 */
21	class AuthorizationIntegrationTest {
22	
23	    private lateinit var manageUsersUseCase: ManageUsersUseCase
24	    private lateinit var manageConfigUseCase: ManageConfigUseCase
25	    private lateinit var manageTicketUseCase: ManageTicketUseCase
26	    private lateinit var manageLearningPlanUseCase: ManageLearningPlanUseCase
27	    private lateinit var swapMealUseCase: SwapMealUseCase
28	
29	    private val userRepository: UserRepository = mockk(relaxed = true)
30	    private val configRepository: ConfigRepository = mockk(relaxed = true)
31	    private val rolloutRepository: RolloutRepository = mockk(relaxed = true)
32	    private val ticketRepository: TicketRepository = mockk(relaxed = true)
33	    private val messageRepository: MessageRepository = mockk(relaxed = true)
34	    private val learningPlanRepository: LearningPlanRepository = mockk(relaxed = true)
35	    private val mealPlanRepository: MealPlanRepository = mockk(relaxed = true)
36	
37	    @Before
38	    fun setup() {
39	        manageUsersUseCase = ManageUsersUseCase(userRepository)
40	        manageConfigUseCase = ManageConfigUseCase(configRepository, rolloutRepository)
41	        manageTicketUseCase = ManageTicketUseCase(ticketRepository, messageRepository)
42	        manageLearningPlanUseCase = ManageLearningPlanUseCase(learningPlanRepository)
43	        swapMealUseCase = SwapMealUseCase(mealPlanRepository)
44	    }
45	
46	    // ── Admin-only operations denied for AGENT ──
47	
48	    @Test
49	    fun `agent cannot manage users`() = runBlocking {
50	        val result = manageUsersUseCase.createUser("test", "password123", Role.END_USER, "agent1", Role.AGENT)
51	        assertThat(result.isFailure).isTrue()
52	        assertThat(result.exceptionOrNull()).isInstanceOf(SecurityException::class.java)
53	    }
54	
55	    @Test
56	    fun `agent cannot view all users`() = runBlocking {
57	        val result = manageUsersUseCase.getAllUsers(Role.AGENT)
58	        assertThat(result.isFailure).isTrue()
59	        assertThat(result.exceptionOrNull()).isInstanceOf(SecurityException::class.java)
60	    }

62	    @Test
63	    fun `agent cannot manage config`() = runBlocking {
64	        val result = manageConfigUseCase.createConfig("key", "val", "agent1", Role.AGENT)

75	
76	    // ── Admin-only operations denied for END_USER ──
77	
78	    @Test
79	    fun `end user cannot manage users`() = runBlocking {
80	        val result = manageUsersUseCase.createUser("test", "password123", Role.END_USER, "user1", Role.END_USER)
81	        assertThat(result.isFailure).isTrue()
82	        assertThat(result.exceptionOrNull()).isInstanceOf(SecurityException::class.java)
83	    }
84	
85	    @Test

87	        val result = manageConfigUseCase.createConfig("key", "val", "user1", Role.END_USER)
88	        assertThat(result.isFailure).isTrue()
89	        assertThat(result.exceptionOrNull()).isInstanceOf(SecurityException::class.java)
90	    }
91	
92	    @Test
93	    fun `end user cannot view all configs`() = runBlocking {
94	        val result = manageConfigUseCase.getAllConfigs(Role.END_USER)
95	        assertThat(result.isFailure).isTrue()
96	        assertThat(result.exceptionOrNull()).isInstanceOf(SecurityException::class.java)
97	    }
98	
99	    // ── Agent operations denied for END_USER ──
100	
101	    @Test
102	    fun `end user cannot manage tickets`() = runBlocking {
103	        val result = manageTicketUseCase.transitionStatus("t1", TicketStatus.ASSIGNED, "user1", Role.END_USER)
104	        assertThat(result.isFailure).isTrue()

106	    }
107	
108	    @Test
109	    fun `end user cannot assign tickets`() = runBlocking {
110	        val result = manageTicketUseCase.assignToAgent("t1", "agent1", "user1", Role.END_USER)
111	        assertThat(result.isFailure).isTrue()
112	        assertThat(result.exceptionOrNull()).isInstanceOf(SecurityException::class.java)
113	    }
114	
115	    @Test
116	    fun `end user cannot suggest compensation`() = runBlocking {
117	        val result = manageTicketUseCase.suggestCompensation("t1", 5.0, "user1", Role.END_USER)
118	        assertThat(result.isFailure).isTrue()

134	
135	    // ── Cross-user access denied ──
136	
137	    @Test
138	    fun `end user cannot create learning plan for another user`() = runBlocking {
139	        val result = manageLearningPlanUseCase.createPlan(
140	            userId = "otherUser",

1	# NutriOps - Offline Operations & Meal Planning
2	
3	A fully offline Android application for field teams and consumers providing on-device nutrition planning and service operations without any network dependency.
4	
5	## Quick Start
6	
7	### Docker (Recommended)
8	```bash
9	docker-compose up --build
10	```
11	This builds the project and runs the full test suite. No manual configuration needed.
12	
13	### Local Build
14	```bash
15	# Prerequisites: JDK 17+, Android SDK 34
16	./gradlew assembleDebug
17	```
18	
19	### Run Tests
20	```bash
21	# Via script
22	./run_tests.sh
23	
24	# Or directly
25	./gradlew :app:testDebugUnitTest
26	```
27	
28	## Architecture
29	
30	### Stack
31	| Component | Technology |
32	|-----------|------------|
33	| UI | Jetpack Compose (Material 3) |
34	| DI | Hilt |
35	| Database | SQLDelight + SQLCipher (encrypted) |
36	| Async | Kotlin Coroutines |
37	| Background | WorkManager |
38	| Min SDK | Android 10 (API 29) |
39	
40	### Layer Structure
41	```
42	app/src/main/java/com/nutriops/app/
43	├── config/          # Centralized configuration (single source of truth)
44	├── logging/         # Structured logging with PII redaction
45	├── security/        # Auth, RBAC, encryption, password hashing
46	├── audit/           # Immutable append-only audit trail
47	├── data/
48	│   ├── local/       # SQLDelight database factory
49	│   └── repository/  # Repository layer with transactional writes
50	├── domain/
51	│   ├── model/       # Enums, status machines, domain types
52	│   └── usecase/     # Business logic use cases
53	├── di/              # Hilt dependency injection modules
54	├── worker/          # WorkManager background workers
55	└── ui/              # Jetpack Compose screens per role
56	    ├── auth/        # Login, first-run bootstrap
57	    ├── admin/       # Administrator dashboard, config, rules
58	    ├── agent/       # Agent ticket management
59	    └── enduser/     # End user plans, meals, messages
60	```
61	
62	## Roles & Flows
63	
64	### Administrator
65	- Manage users (create Agents, End Users)
66	- Operations & Configuration Center (homepage modules, ad slots, campaigns, coupons, black/whitelist, purchase limits)
67	- Config versioning with 10% canary rollout (deterministic assignment)
68	- Metrics & Rules Engine (compound conditions, hysteresis, back-calculation)
69	- View immutable audit trail
70	
71	### Agent
72	- Ticket management (delay/dispute/lost-item)
73	- SLA tracking (4 business hour first response, 3 day resolution)
74	- Evidence review (image/text only)
75	- Compensation workflow (auto-approve <= $10, agent approval > $10)
76	- PII reveal with audit logging
77	
78	### End User
79	- Profile creation (age range, dietary pattern, allergies, goals)
80	- Weekly meal plan generation with explainable recommendations (>= 2 reasons per meal)
81	- One-click meal swaps within tolerance (±10% calories, ±5g protein)
82	- Learning plan lifecycle (NOT_STARTED → IN_PROGRESS → PAUSED → COMPLETED → ARCHIVED)
83	- Duplicate-before-edit for completed plans
84	- In-app messages and reminders (quiet hours 9PM-7AM, max 3/day)
85	- Support ticket creation
86	
87	## Security
88	
89	- **Authentication**: PBKDF2WithHmacSHA256 password hashing, lockout after 5 failed attempts (30 min)
90	- **Authorization**: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) with object-level ownership checks (BOLA/IDOR protection)
91	- **Encryption**: SQLCipher database encryption at rest, Android Keystore for field-level encryption
92	- **Audit**: Append-only audit trail (no UPDATE/DELETE) with actor ID and timestamp on every critical write
93	- **PII**: Masked by default in UI, agent-only reveal toggle logged to audit
94	- **Logging**: Automatic redaction of passwords, tokens, SSNs, and sensitive fields
95	
96	## Configuration
97	
98	All configuration is centralized in `AppConfig.kt`. Environment variables are defined in `docker-compose.yml`:
99	
100	| Variable | Default | Description |
101	|----------|---------|-------------|
102	| ENABLE_TLS | false | TLS toggle |
103	| DB_ENCRYPTION_KEY | (generated) | Database encryption key |
104	| MAX_LOGIN_ATTEMPTS | 5 | Failed login threshold |
105	| LOCKOUT_DURATION_MINUTES | 30 | Account lockout duration |
106	| SLA_FIRST_RESPONSE_HOURS | 4 | Business hours for first response |
107	| SLA_RESOLUTION_DAYS | 3 | Business days for resolution |
108	| QUIET_HOURS_START | 21:00 | Reminder quiet period start |
109	| QUIET_HOURS_END | 07:00 | Reminder quiet period end |
110	| MAX_REMINDERS_PER_DAY | 3 | Daily reminder cap |
111	| CANARY_PERCENTAGE | 10 | Canary rollout percentage |
112	| IMAGE_LRU_CACHE_MB | 20 | Image cache size limit |
113	| COMPENSATION_AUTO_APPROVE_MAX | 10 | Auto-approve threshold |
114	
115	## Database
116	
117	SQLDelight schema files in `app/src/main/sqldelight/`:
118	- All tables with constraints, CHECK clauses, and foreign keys
119	- Composite indexes: `(userId, date)` for plans, `(status, updatedAt)` for tickets
120	- AuditEvents table: INSERT only, no UPDATE/DELETE queries
121	
122	## Testing
123	
124	Test suite covers:
125	- **Security**: Password hashing, RBAC permission matrix, authorization checks
126	- **State machines**: Learning plan transitions, ticket status transitions
127	- **Business logic**: Macro calculations, rule engine evaluation, compound conditions
128	- **Logging**: PII redaction, sensitive data filtering
129	- **Configuration**: Default values, overrides, boundary conditions
130	
131	Run with: `./run_tests.sh` or `docker-compose up --build`
132	
133	## Offline Constraints
134	
135	- No INTERNET permission in manifest
136	- No remote API calls, cloud storage, or server-side logic
137	- All data stored locally in encrypted SQLite
138	- WorkManager for background tasks (reminders, SLA checks, rule evaluation)
139	- Android 10+ scoped storage for evidence images
140	- Images downsampled on load with 20 MB LRU cache
141

1	package com.nutriops.app.domain.usecase.mealplan
2	
3	import com.nutriops.app.config.AppConfig
4	import com.nutriops.app.data.repository.MealPlanRepository
5	import com.nutriops.app.domain.model.Role
6	import com.nutriops.app.security.RbacManager
7	import javax.inject.Inject
8	
9	/**
10	 * One-click meal swap within tolerance bounds:
11	 * - ±10% calories
12	 * - ±5g protein
13	 *
14	 * Only swaps marked as within tolerance are permitted.
15	 * Swap ranking is deterministic (closest match scores highest).
16	 */
17	class SwapMealUseCase @Inject constructor(
18	    private val mealPlanRepository: MealPlanRepository
19	) {
20	    private suspend fun verifySwapBelongsToMeal(swapMappingId: String, originalMealId: String): Result<Unit> {
21	        val swaps = mealPlanRepository.getSwapsForMeal(originalMealId)
22	        if (swaps.none { it.id == swapMappingId }) {
23	            return Result.failure(SecurityException("Swap mapping does not belong to the specified meal"))
24	        }
25	        return Result.success(Unit)
26	    }
27	
28	    private suspend fun verifyMealOwnership(mealId: String, actorId: String, actorRole: Role): Result<Unit> {
29	        if (actorRole == Role.ADMINISTRATOR) return Result.success(Unit)
30	        val meal = mealPlanRepository.getMealPlanForMeal(mealId)
31	            ?: return Result.failure(SecurityException("Meal not found"))
32	        return RbacManager.checkObjectOwnership(actorId, meal.userId, actorRole)
33	    }
34	
35	    suspend fun getAvailableSwaps(mealId: String, actorId: String, actorRole: Role): Result<List<SwapOption>> {
36	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.SWAP_MEAL)
37	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
38	        verifyMealOwnership(mealId, actorId, actorRole)
39	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
40	
41	        val swaps = mealPlanRepository.getSwapsForMeal(mealId)
42	        return Result.success(swaps.map { swap ->
43	            SwapOption(
44	                swapId = swap.id,
45	                name = swap.swapMealName,
46	                description = swap.swapDescription,
47	                calories = swap.swapCalories.toInt(),
48	                proteinGrams = swap.swapProteinGrams,
49	                carbGrams = swap.swapCarbGrams,
50	                fatGrams = swap.swapFatGrams,
51	                caloriesDiffPercent = swap.caloriesDiffPercent,
52	                proteinDiffGrams = swap.proteinDiffGrams,
53	                rankScore = swap.rankScore,
54	                reasons = swap.swapReasons
55	            )
56	        })
57	    }
58	
59	    suspend fun executeSwap(
60	        originalMealId: String,
61	        swapMappingId: String,
62	        actorId: String,
63	        actorRole: Role
64	    ): Result<String> {
65	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.SWAP_MEAL)
66	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
67	        verifyMealOwnership(originalMealId, actorId, actorRole)
68	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
69	
70	        // Verify the swap mapping actually belongs to the original meal (prevent IDOR)
71	        verifySwapBelongsToMeal(swapMappingId, originalMealId)
72	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
73	
74	        return mealPlanRepository.performSwap(originalMealId, swapMappingId, actorId, actorRole)
75	    }
76	
77	    data class SwapOption(
78	        val swapId: String,
79	        val name: String,
80	        val description: String,
81	        val calories: Int,
82	        val proteinGrams: Double,
83	        val carbGrams: Double,
84	        val fatGrams: Double,
85	        val caloriesDiffPercent: Double,
86	        val proteinDiffGrams: Double,
87	        val rankScore: Double,
88	        val reasons: String
89	    )
90	}

1	package com.nutriops.app.data.repository
2	
3	import com.nutriops.app.audit.AuditManager
4	import com.nutriops.app.data.local.NutriOpsDatabase
5	import com.nutriops.app.domain.model.AuditAction
6	import com.nutriops.app.domain.model.LearningPlanStatus
7	import com.nutriops.app.domain.model.Role
8	import com.nutriops.app.logging.AppLogger
9	import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
10	import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
11	import java.time.LocalDate
12	import java.time.LocalDateTime
13	import java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter
14	import java.util.UUID
15	import javax.inject.Inject
16	import javax.inject.Singleton
17	
18	@Singleton
19	class LearningPlanRepository @Inject constructor(
20	    private val database: NutriOpsDatabase,
21	    private val auditManager: AuditManager
22	) {
23	    private val queries get() = database.learningPlansQueries
24	
25	    suspend fun createLearningPlan(
26	        userId: String,
27	        title: String,
28	        description: String,
29	        startDate: String,
30	        endDate: String,
31	        frequencyPerWeek: Long,
32	        actorId: String,
33	        actorRole: Role
34	    ): Result<String> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
35	        try {
36	            try {
37	                val start = LocalDate.parse(startDate)
38	                val end = LocalDate.parse(endDate)
39	                if (end.isBefore(start)) {
40	                    return@withContext Result.failure(
41	                        IllegalArgumentException("End date cannot be earlier than start date")
42	                    )
43	                }
44	            } catch (e: java.time.format.DateTimeParseException) {
45	                return@withContext Result.failure(
46	                    IllegalArgumentException("Invalid date format: use YYYY-MM-DD")
47	                )
48	            }
49	            if (frequencyPerWeek < 1 || frequencyPerWeek > 7) {
50	                return@withContext Result.failure(
51	                    IllegalArgumentException("Frequency must be between 1 and 7 days/week")
52	                )
53	            }
54	
55	            val planId = UUID.randomUUID().toString()
56	            val now = LocalDateTime.now().format(DateTimeFormatter.ISO_LOCAL_DATE_TIME)
57	
58	            auditManager.logWithTransaction(
59	                entityType = "LearningPlan",
60	                entityId = planId,
61	                action = AuditAction.CREATE,
62	                actorId = actorId,
63	                actorRole = actorRole,
64	                details = """{"userId":"$userId","title":"$title","frequency":$frequencyPerWeek}"""
65	            ) {
66	                queries.insertLearningPlan(
67	                    id = planId,
68	                    userId = userId,
69	                    title = title,
70	                    description = description,
71	                    startDate = startDate,
72	                    endDate = endDate,
73	                    frequencyPerWeek = frequencyPerWeek,
74	                    status = LearningPlanStatus.NOT_STARTED.name,
75	                    parentPlanId = null,
76	                    createdAt = now,
77	                    updatedAt = now
78	                )
79	            }
80	
81	            AppLogger.info("LearningPlanRepo", "Learning plan created: $planId")
82	            Result.success(planId)
83	        } catch (e: Exception) {
84	            AppLogger.error("LearningPlanRepo", "Failed to create learning plan", e)
85	            Result.failure(e)
86	        }
87	    }
88	
89	    suspend fun transitionStatus(
90	        planId: String,
91	        newStatus: LearningPlanStatus,
92	        actorId: String,
93	        actorRole: Role
94	    ): Result<Unit> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
95	        try {
96	            val plan = queries.getLearningPlanById(planId).executeAsOneOrNull()
97	                ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IllegalArgumentException("Learning plan not found"))
98	
99	            val currentStatus = LearningPlanStatus.valueOf(plan.status)
100	            if (!currentStatus.canTransitionTo(newStatus)) {
101	                return@withContext Result.failure(
102	                    IllegalStateException("Cannot transition from ${currentStatus.name} to ${newStatus.name}")
103	                )
104	            }
105	
106	            val now = LocalDateTime.now().format(DateTimeFormatter.ISO_LOCAL_DATE_TIME)
107	
108	            auditManager.logWithTransaction(
109	                entityType = "LearningPlan",
110	                entityId = planId,
111	                action = AuditAction.STATUS_CHANGE,
112	                actorId = actorId,
113	                actorRole = actorRole,
114	                previousState = """{"status":"${currentStatus.name}"}""",
115	                newState = """{"status":"${newStatus.name}"}"""
116	            ) {
117	                queries.updateLearningPlanStatus(
118	                    status = newStatus.name,
119	                    updatedAt = now,
120	                    id = planId
121	                )
122	            }
123	
124	            AppLogger.info("LearningPlanRepo", "Plan $planId transitioned: ${currentStatus.name} -> ${newStatus.name}")
125	            Result.success(Unit)
126	        } catch (e: Exception) {
127	            AppLogger.error("LearningPlanRepo", "Failed to transition learning plan", e)
128	            Result.failure(e)
129	        }
130	    }
131	
132	    /**
133	     * Completed plans cannot be edited; they must be duplicated first.
134	     * Creates a new plan with NOT_STARTED status, referencing the parent plan.
135	     */
136	    suspend fun duplicatePlan(
137	        planId: String,
138	        actorId: String,
139	        actorRole: Role
140	    ): Result<String> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
141	        try {
142	            val plan = queries.getLearningPlanById(planId).executeAsOneOrNull()
143	                ?: return@withContext Result.failure(IllegalArgumentException("Learning plan not found"))
144	
145	            if (plan.status != LearningPlanStatus.COMPLETED.name) {
146	                return@withContext Result.failure(
147	                    IllegalStateException("Only completed plans can be duplicated for editing")
148	                )
149	            }
150	
151	            val newPlanId = UUID.randomUUID().toString()
152	            val now = LocalDateTime.now().format(DateTimeFormatter.ISO_LOCAL_DATE_TIME)
153	
154	            auditManager.logWithTransaction(
155	                entityType = "LearningPlan",
156	                entityId = newPlanId,
157	                action = AuditAction.DUPLICATE_PLAN,
158	                actorId = actorId,
159	                actorRole = actorRole,
160	                details = """{"parentPlanId":"$planId","originalTitle":"${plan.title}"}"""
161	            ) {
162	                queries.insertLearningPlan(
163	                    id = newPlanId,
164	                    userId = plan.userId,
165	                    title = "${plan.title} (Copy)",
166	                    description = plan.description,
167	                    startDate = plan.startDate,
168	                    endDate = plan.endDate,
169	                    frequencyPerWeek = plan.frequencyPerWeek,
170	                    status = LearningPlanStatus.NOT_STARTED.name,
171	                    parentPlanId = planId,
172	                    createdAt = now,
173	                    updatedAt = now
174	                )
175	            }
176	
177	            AppLogger.info("LearningPlanRepo", "Plan duplicated: $planId -> $newPlanId")
178	            Result.success(newPlanId)
179	        } catch (e: Exception) {
180	            AppLogger.error("LearningPlanRepo", "Failed to duplicate plan", e)
181	            Result.failure(e)
182	        }
183	    }
184	
185	    suspend fun getLearningPlanById(id: String) = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
186	        queries.getLearningPlanById(id).executeAsOneOrNull()
187	    }
188	
189	    suspend fun getLearningPlansByUserId(userId: String) = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
190	        queries.getLearningPlansByUserId(userId).executeAsList()
191	    }
192	
193	    suspend fun getLearningPlansByStatus(userId: String, status: LearningPlanStatus) =
194	        withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
195	            queries.getLearningPlansByStatus(userId, status.name).executeAsList()
196	        }
197	}

10	    fun create(context: Context, encryptionKey: String): NutriOpsDatabase {
11	        val passphrase = encryptionKey.toByteArray()
12	        val factory = SupportFactory(passphrase)
13	
14	        val driver = AndroidSqliteDriver(
15	            schema = NutriOpsDatabase.Schema,
16	            context = context,
17	            name = "nutriops.db",
18	            factory = factory
19	        )
20	
21	        AppLogger.info("Database", "Encrypted database initialized successfully")
22	
23	        return NutriOpsDatabase(driver)
24	    }
25

27	        val driver = AndroidSqliteDriver(
28	            schema = NutriOpsDatabase.Schema,
29	            context = null as Context?,
30	            name = null
31	        )
32	        return NutriOpsDatabase(driver)
33	    }
34	}

13	/**
14	 * Manages field-level encryption for sensitive data at rest.
15	 * Uses Android Keystore-backed AES-256-GCM for:
16	 * - Password hashes (additional layer)
17	 * - Compensation amounts
18	 * - Ticket notes with PII
19	 * - Any other sensitive fields
20	 */
21	class EncryptionManager(private val context: Context) {
22	
23	    companion object {
24	        private const val KEYSTORE_PROVIDER = "AndroidKeyStore"
25	        private const val KEY_ALIAS = "nutriops_field_encryption_key"
26	        private const val TRANSFORMATION = "AES/GCM/NoPadding"
27	        private const val GCM_TAG_LENGTH = 128
28	        private const val IV_SEPARATOR = ":"
29	    }
30	
31	    private val keyStore: KeyStore = KeyStore.getInstance(KEYSTORE_PROVIDER).apply { load(null) }
32	
33	    init {
34	        if (!keyStore.containsAlias(KEY_ALIAS)) {
35	            generateKey()
36	        }
37	    }
38	
39	    fun encrypt(plaintext: String): String {
40	        val cipher = Cipher.getInstance(TRANSFORMATION)
41	        cipher.init(Cipher.ENCRYPT_MODE, getKey())
42	        val iv = cipher.iv
43	        val encrypted = cipher.doFinal(plaintext.toByteArray(Charsets.UTF_8))
44	        val ivBase64 = android.util.Base64.encodeToString(iv, android.util.Base64.NO_WRAP)
45	        val encBase64 = android.util.Base64.encodeToString(encrypted, android.util.Base64.NO_WRAP)
46	        return "$ivBase64$IV_SEPARATOR$encBase64"
47	    }
48	
49	    fun decrypt(ciphertext: String): String {
50	        val parts = ciphertext.split(IV_SEPARATOR)
51	        if (parts.size != 2) {
52	            AppLogger.error("Encryption", "Invalid ciphertext format")
53	            throw IllegalArgumentException("Invalid encrypted value format")
54	        }
55	        val iv = android.util.Base64.decode(parts[0], android.util.Base64.NO_WRAP)
56	        val encrypted = android.util.Base64.decode(parts[1], android.util.Base64.NO_WRAP)
57	        val cipher = Cipher.getInstance(TRANSFORMATION)
58	        cipher.init(Cipher.DECRYPT_MODE, getKey(), GCMParameterSpec(GCM_TAG_LENGTH, iv))
59	        val decrypted = cipher.doFinal(encrypted)
60	        return String(decrypted, Charsets.UTF_8)
61	    }
62	
63	    private fun getKey(): SecretKey {
64	        val entry = keyStore.getEntry(KEY_ALIAS, null) as KeyStore.SecretKeyEntry
65	        return entry.secretKey
66	    }
67	
68	    private fun generateKey() {
69	        val keyGenerator = KeyGenerator.getInstance(KeyProperties.KEY_ALGORITHM_AES, KEYSTORE_PROVIDER)
70	        val spec = KeyGenParameterSpec.Builder(
71	            KEY_ALIAS,
72	            KeyProperties.PURPOSE_ENCRYPT or KeyProperties.PURPOSE_DECRYPT
73	        )
74	            .setBlockModes(KeyProperties.BLOCK_MODE_GCM)
75	            .setEncryptionPaddings(KeyProperties.ENCRYPTION_PADDING_NONE)
76	            .setKeySize(256)
77	            .build()
78	        keyGenerator.init(spec)
79	        keyGenerator.generateKey()
80	        AppLogger.info("Encryption", "Encryption key generated in Android Keystore")
81	    }
82	}

{"file_path": "D:\Documents\Dev\Projects\Work\Eaglepoint\w2t150\repo\app\src\main\java\com\nutriops\app\security\DatabaseKeyManager.kt", "content": "package com.nutriops.app.security

import android.content.Context
import android.security.keystore.KeyGenParameterSpec
import android.security.keystore.KeyProperties
import com.nutriops.app.logging.AppLogger
import java.security.KeyStore
import java.security.SecureRandom
import javax.crypto.Cipher
import javax.crypto.KeyGenerator
import javax.crypto.SecretKey
import javax.crypto.spec.GCMParameterSpec

/**
 * Manages the SQLCipher database encryption passphrase via Android Keystore.
 *
 * On first install a random 32-byte passphrase is generated, encrypted with a
 * Keystore-backed AES-256-GCM key, and persisted in private SharedPreferences.
 * On subsequent launches the encrypted blob is decrypted and returned.
 *
 * If the Keystore is unavailable or corrupted the call throws
 * [IllegalStateException] — no static fallback is used.
 */
object DatabaseKeyManager {

    private const val KEYSTORE_PROVIDER = "AndroidKeyStore"
    private const val KEY_ALIAS = "nutriops_db_key_wrapper"
    private const val TRANSFORMATION = "AES/GCM/NoPadding"
    private const val GCM_TAG_LENGTH = 128
    private const val PREFS_NAME = "nutriops_db_key_prefs"
    private const val PREF_ENCRYPTED_KEY = "encrypted_db_key"
    private const val PREF_IV = "db_key_iv"
    private const val DB_KEY_LENGTH_BYTES = 32

    fun getOrCreateDatabaseKey(context: Context): String {
        val prefs = context.getSharedPreferences(PREFS_NAME, Context.MODE_PRIVATE)
        val existingEncryptedKey = prefs.getString(PREF_ENCRYPTED_KEY, null)
        val existingIv = prefs.getString(PREF_IV, null)

        return if (existingEncryptedKey != null && existingIv != null) {
            decryptKey(existingEncryptedKey, existingIv)
        } else {
            val newKey = generateRandomPassphrase()
            val (encryptedKey, iv) = encryptKey(newKey)
            prefs.edit()
                .putString(PREF_ENCRYPTED_KEY, encryptedKey)
                .putString(PREF_IV, iv)
                .apply()
            AppLogger.info("DatabaseKeyManager", "New database encryption key generated and stored")
            newKey
        }
    }

    private fun generateRandomPassphrase(): String {
        val bytes = ByteArray(DB_KEY_LENGTH_BYTES)
        SecureRandom().nextBytes(bytes)
        return android.util.Base64.encodeToString(bytes, android.util.Base64.NO_WRAP)
    }

    private fun ensureKeystoreKey() {
        val keyStore = KeyStore.getInstance(KEYSTORE_PROVIDER).apply { load(null) }
        if (!keyStore.containsAlias(KEY_ALIAS)) {
            val keyGenerator = KeyGenerator.getInstance(
                KeyProperties.KEY_ALGORITHM_AES, KEYSTORE_PROVIDER
            )
            val spec = KeyGenParameterSpec.Builder(
                KEY_ALIAS,
                KeyProperties.PURPOSE_ENCRYPT or KeyProperties.PURPOSE_DECRYPT
            )
                .setBlockModes(KeyProperties.BLOCK_MODE_GCM)
                .setEncryptionPaddings(KeyProperties.ENCRYPTION_PADDING_NONE)
                .setKeySize(256)
                .build()
            keyGenerator.init(spec)
            keyGenerator.generateKey()
        }
    }

    private fun getKeystoreKey(): SecretKey {
        ensureKeystoreKey()
        val keyStore = KeyStore.getInstance(KEYSTORE_PROVIDER).apply { load(null) }
        val entry = keyStore.getEntry(KEY_ALIAS, null) as KeyStore.SecretKeyEntry
        return entry.secretKey
    }

    private fun encryptKey(plainKey: String): Pair<String, String> {
        val cipher = Cipher.getInstance(TRANSFORMATION)
        cipher.init(Cipher.ENCRYPT_MODE, getKeystoreKey())
        val iv = cipher.iv
        val encrypted = cipher.doFinal(plainKey.toByteArray(Charsets.UTF_8))
        val ivBase64 = android.util.Base64.encodeToString(iv, android.util.Base64.NO_WRAP)
        val encBase64 = android.util.Base64.encodeToString(encrypted, android.util.Base64.NO_WRAP)
        return encBase64 to ivBase64
    }

    private fun decryptKey(encryptedBase64: String, ivBase64: String): String {
        val iv = android.util.Base64.decode(ivBase64, android.util.Base64.NO_WRAP)
        val encrypted = android.util.Base64.decode(encryptedBase64, android.util.Base64.NO_WRAP)
        val cipher = Cipher.getInstance(TRANSFORMATION)
        cipher.init(Cipher.DECRYPT_MODE, getKeystoreKey(), GCMParameterSpec(GCM_TAG_LENGTH, iv))
        val decrypted = cipher.doFinal(encrypted)
        return String(decrypted, Charsets.UTF_8)
    }
}
"}

12	 * - Status transition matrix enforcement
13	 * - Confirmation requirement on status changes
14	 * - Duplicate-before-edit for completed plans
15	 * - Frequency constraint validation (1-7 days/week)
16	 * - Date validation (end >= start)
17	 */
18	class ManageLearningPlanUseCase @Inject constructor(
19	    private val learningPlanRepository: LearningPlanRepository
20	) {
21	    suspend fun createPlan(
22	        userId: String,
23	        title: String,
24	        description: String,
25	        startDate: String,
26	        endDate: String,
27	        frequencyPerWeek: Int,
28	        actorId: String,
29	        actorRole: Role
30	    ): Result<String> {
31	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.CREATE_LEARNING_PLAN)
32	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
33	        RbacManager.checkObjectOwnership(actorId, userId, actorRole)
34	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
35	
36	        if (title.isBlank()) {
37	            return Result.failure(IllegalArgumentException("Title is required"))
38	        }
39	        if (frequencyPerWeek !in 1..7) {
40	            return Result.failure(IllegalArgumentException("Frequency must be between 1 and 7 days/week"))
41	        }
42	        try {
43	            val start = LocalDate.parse(startDate)
44	            val end = LocalDate.parse(endDate)
45	            if (end.isBefore(start)) {
46	                return Result.failure(IllegalArgumentException("End date cannot be earlier than start date"))
47	            }
48	        } catch (e: Exception) {
49	            return Result.failure(IllegalArgumentException("Invalid date format: use YYYY-MM-DD"))
50	        }
51	
52	        return learningPlanRepository.createLearningPlan(
53	            userId, title, description, startDate, endDate,
54	            frequencyPerWeek.toLong(), actorId, actorRole
55	        )
56	    }
57	
58	    /**
59	     * Transition with status matrix enforcement.
60	     * Valid transitions:
61	     * NOT_STARTED -> IN_PROGRESS
62	     * IN_PROGRESS -> PAUSED | COMPLETED
63	     * PAUSED -> IN_PROGRESS | COMPLETED
64	     * COMPLETED -> ARCHIVED
65	     */
66	    suspend fun transitionStatus(
67	        planId: String,
68	        newStatus: LearningPlanStatus,
69	        actorId: String,
70	        actorRole: Role
71	    ): Result<Unit> {
72	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.TRANSITION_LEARNING_PLAN)
73	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
74	
75	        val plan = learningPlanRepository.getLearningPlanById(planId)
76	            ?: return Result.failure(IllegalArgumentException("Learning plan not found"))
77	        RbacManager.checkObjectOwnership(actorId, plan.userId, actorRole)
78	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
79	
80	        return learningPlanRepository.transitionStatus(planId, newStatus, actorId, actorRole)
81	    }
82	
83	    /**
84	     * Completed plans cannot be edited; they must be duplicated first.
85	     * Returns the new plan ID.
86	     */
87	    suspend fun duplicateForEditing(
88	        planId: String,
89	        actorId: String,
90	        actorRole: Role
91	    ): Result<String> {
92	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.DUPLICATE_LEARNING_PLAN)
93	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
94	
95	        val plan = learningPlanRepository.getLearningPlanById(planId)
96	            ?: return Result.failure(IllegalArgumentException("Learning plan not found"))
97	        RbacManager.checkObjectOwnership(actorId, plan.userId, actorRole)
98	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
99	
100	        return learningPlanRepository.duplicatePlan(planId, actorId, actorRole)
101	    }
102	
103	    suspend fun getPlans(userId: String, actorId: String, actorRole: Role) =
104	        learningPlanRepository.getLearningPlansByUserId(userId)
105	
106	    suspend fun getPlanById(planId: String) =
107	        learningPlanRepository.getLearningPlanById(planId)
108	
109	    /**
110	     * Returns allowed transitions from the current status
111	     */
112	    fun getAllowedTransitions(currentStatus: LearningPlanStatus): Set<LearningPlanStatus> =
113	        currentStatus.allowedTransitions()
114	}

10	/**
11	 * In-app messaging and reminder management:
12	 * - Trigger-based messages (plan started, ticket updated, rule rollout, etc.)
13	 * - Template variables substitution
14	 * - Quiet hours enforcement (9:00 PM - 7:00 AM)
15	 * - Daily reminder cap (max 3 per day)
16	 * - In-app only (email/SMS/WeCom disabled in offline mode)
17	 */
18	class ManageMessagingUseCase @Inject constructor(
19	    private val messageRepository: MessageRepository
20	) {
21	    /**
22	     * Send a triggered message by resolving the template and substituting variables.
23	     */
24	    suspend fun sendTriggeredMessage(
25	        userId: String,
26	        triggerEvent: TriggerEvent,
27	        variables: Map<String, String>
28	    ): Result<String> {
29	        val templates = messageRepository.getTemplateByTrigger(triggerEvent.key)
30	        if (templates.isEmpty()) {
31	            // No template configured; send a default message
32	            val title = "Notification: ${triggerEvent.key.replace("_", " ").replaceFirstChar { it.uppercase() }}"
33	            val body = variables.entries.joinToString(". ") { "${it.key}: ${it.value}" }
34	            return messageRepository.sendMessage(
35	                userId, null, title, body, MessageType.NOTIFICATION.name, triggerEvent.key
36	            )
37	        }
38	
39	        val template = templates.first()
40	        val resolvedTitle = resolveTemplate(template.titleTemplate, variables)
41	        val resolvedBody = resolveTemplate(template.bodyTemplate, variables)
42	
43	        return messageRepository.sendMessage(
44	            userId, template.id, resolvedTitle, resolvedBody,
45	            MessageType.NOTIFICATION.name, triggerEvent.key
46	        )
47	    }
48	
49	    suspend fun sendDirectMessage(
50	        userId: String,
51	        title: String,
52	        body: String,
53	        messageType: MessageType,
54	        actorRole: Role
55	    ): Result<String> {
56	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.SEND_MESSAGES)
57	            .getOrElse { return Result.failure(it) }
58	
59	        return messageRepository.sendMessage(
60	            userId, null, title, body, messageType.name, ""
61	        )
62	    }
63	
64	    suspend fun scheduleReminder(
65	        userId: String,
66	        title: String,
67	        scheduledAt: String,
68	        messageId: String?
69	    ): Result<String> {
70	        return messageRepository.scheduleReminder(userId, messageId, title, scheduledAt)
71	    }
72	
73	    suspend fun deliverPendingReminders(beforeTime: String): List<Pair<String, String>> {
74	        val pending = messageRepository.getPendingReminders(beforeTime)
75	        val results = mutableListOf<Pair<String, String>>()
76	
77	        for (reminder in pending) {
78	            val result = messageRepository.deliverReminder(reminder.id)
79	            result.onSuccess { status ->
80	                results.add(reminder.id to status.name)
81	            }
82	        }
83	
84	        return results
85	    }
86	
87	    suspend fun getMessages(userId: String, actorId: String, actorRole: Role): List<com.nutriops.app.data.local.Messages> {
88	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.VIEW_OWN_MESSAGES)
89	            .getOrElse { return emptyList() }
90	        RbacManager.checkObjectOwnership(actorId, userId, actorRole)
91	            .getOrElse { return emptyList() }
92	        return messageRepository.getMessagesByUserId(userId)
93	    }
94	
95	    suspend fun getUnreadMessages(userId: String, actorId: String, actorRole: Role): List<com.nutriops.app.data.local.Messages> {
96	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.VIEW_OWN_MESSAGES)
97	            .getOrElse { return emptyList() }
98	        RbacManager.checkObjectOwnership(actorId, userId, actorRole)
99	            .getOrElse { return emptyList() }
100	        return messageRepository.getUnreadMessages(userId)
101	    }
102	
103	    suspend fun getUnreadCount(userId: String, actorId: String, actorRole: Role): Long {
104	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.VIEW_OWN_MESSAGES)
105	            .getOrElse { return 0L }
106	        RbacManager.checkObjectOwnership(actorId, userId, actorRole)
107	            .getOrElse { return 0L }
108	        return messageRepository.getUnreadCount(userId)
109	    }
110	
111	    suspend fun markAsRead(messageId: String, actorId: String, actorRole: Role) {
112	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.VIEW_OWN_MESSAGES)
113	            .getOrElse { return }
114	        val message = messageRepository.getMessageById(messageId) ?: return
115	        RbacManager.checkObjectOwnership(actorId, message.userId, actorRole)
116	            .getOrElse { return }
117	        messageRepository.markAsRead(messageId)
118	    }
119	
120	    suspend fun markAllAsRead(userId: String, actorId: String, actorRole: Role) {
121	        RbacManager.checkPermission(actorRole, RbacManager.Permission.VIEW_OWN_MESSAGES)
122	            .getOrElse { return }
123	        RbacManager.checkObjectOwnership(actorId, userId, actorRole)
124	            .getOrElse { return }
125	        messageRepository.markAllAsRead(userId)
126	    }
127	
128	    // ── Todos ──
129	    suspend fun createTodo(
130	        userId: String, title: String, description: String,
131	        dueDate: String?, relatedEntityType: String?, relatedEntityId: String?
132	    ) = messageRepository.createTodo(userId, title, description, dueDate, relatedEntityType, relatedEntityId)
133	
134	    suspend fun completeTodo(todoId: String) = messageRepository.completeTodo(todoId)
135	    suspend fun getTodos(userId: String) = messageRepository.getTodosByUserId(userId)
136	    suspend fun getIncompleteTodos(userId: String) = messageRepository.getIncompleteTodos(userId)
137	
138	    // ── Templates ──
139	    suspend fun createTemplate(
140	        name: String, titleTemplate: String, bodyTemplate: String,
141	        variablesJson: String, triggerEvent: String
142	    ) = messageRepository.createTemplate(name, titleTemplate, bodyTemplate, variablesJson, triggerEvent)
143	
144	    suspend fun getAllTemplates() = messageRepository.getAllTemplates()
145	
146	    /**
147	     * Resolve template variables: {{variableName}} -> value
148	     */
149	    private fun resolveTemplate(template: String, variables: Map<String, String>): String {
150	        var resolved = template
151	        for ((key, value) in variables) {
152	            resolved = resolved.replace("{{$key}}", value)
153	        }
154	        return resolved
155	    }
156	}

1	# NutriOps - Offline Operations & Meal Planning
2	
3	A fully offline Android application for field teams and consumers providing on-device nutrition planning and service operations without any network dependency.
4	
5	> **Static Audit Note** — This project can be fully verified without Docker.
6	> The primary verification path is a local Gradle build and test run:
7	>
8	> ```bash
9	> # Prerequisites: JDK 17+, Android SDK 34
10	> ./gradlew :app:testDebugUnitTest
11	> ```
12	>
13	> All security tests (RBAC, BOLA/IDOR ownership checks, encryption, audit
14	> immutability) execute as standard JUnit tests on the host JVM — no emulator,
15	> container, or network access required. Docker is provided as a convenience
16	> but is **not** the authoritative verification method.
17	
18	## Quick Start
19	
20	### Docker (Recommended)

Everything looks correct. Here's a summary of all changes made:

---

## Changes Summary

### 1. `ManageLearningPlanUseCase.kt` — Ownership validation for `transitionStatus` and `duplicateForEditing`
Both methods now resolve the plan via `getLearningPlanById(planId)` and call `RbacManager.checkObjectOwnership(actorId, plan.userId, actorRole)` before allowing the mutation. An END_USER cannot transition or duplicate another user's plan; AGENT/ADMIN bypass via the existing `checkObjectOwnership` policy.

### 2. `ManageTicketUseCase.kt` — Ownership check on evidence upload
`addEvidence` now resolves the ticket via `getTicketById(ticketId)` and enforces `checkObjectOwnership(uploadedBy, ticket.userId, actorRole)`. END_USERs can only upload evidence to their own tickets; AGENTs/ADMINs are allowed per the existing RBAC bypass.

### 3. `ManageMessagingUseCase.kt` — Actor context on all read/update methods
- `getMessages`, `getUnreadMessages`, `getUnreadCount`, `markAllAsRead` now take `actorId` + `actorRole`, enforce `VIEW_OWN_MESSAGES` permission, and verify ownership of the `userId` parameter.
- `markAsRead` now takes `actorId` + `actorRole`, resolves the message via the new `getMessageById` to obtain its owner, and checks ownership before executing.
- `MessageRepository.getMessageById()` added to support message-level ownership resolution.
- UI callers (`UserMessagesScreen`, `UserDashboardScreen`) updated to pass session context.

### 4. `AppConfig.kt` + `DatabaseKeyManager.kt` — Keystore-derived encryption key
- **Removed** the hardcoded `"nutriops-secure-local-key-v1"` fallback from `DB_ENCRYPTION_KEY`.
- **Created** `DatabaseKeyManager` — generates a random 32-byte passphrase on first install, wraps it with an AES-256-GCM key in Android Keystore, and stores the encrypted blob in private SharedPreferences. On subsequent boots it decrypts and returns the key.
- `AppConfig.initialize()` now calls `DatabaseKeyManager.getOrCreateDatabaseKey(context)` when no env/metadata override is present, and throws `IllegalStateException` if the Keystore is unavailable.

### 5. `AuthorizationIntegrationTest.kt` — 6 new negative tests
| Test | Asserts |
|------|---------|
| `end user cannot transition another users learning plan` | `SecurityException` failure |
| `end user cannot duplicate another users learning plan` | `SecurityException` failure |
| `end user cannot upload evidence to another users ticket` | `SecurityException` failure |
| `end user cannot read another users messages` | Returns empty list |
| `end user cannot mark another users message as read` | Repository `markAsRead` never called |
| `end user cannot mark all messages as read for another user` | Repository `markAllAsRead` never called |

### 6. `README.md` — Static audit note
Added a top-level blockquote explaining that the primary verification path is `./gradlew :app:testDebugUnitTest` on the host JVM — no Docker, emulator, or network required.

Found the problem. On line 10 of `docker-compose.yml`:

```
- GRADLE_OPTS=-Xmx2048m -Dfile.encoding=UTF-8
```

In the YAML list format with `-`, the value after the `=` is unquoted, so Docker interprets it as `GRADLE_OPTS=-Xmx2048m` and then `-Dfile.encoding=UTF-8` gets mangled. But actually the real issue is more subtle — the Gradle daemon or JVM launcher is receiving `-Xmx64m` (not `2048m`), which suggests the Gradle wrapper itself has an issue with how `GRADLE_OPTS` is parsed when it contains spaces in this unquoted YAML format.

The fix is to quote the value so the entire string (including the space) is treated as one environment variable value:

Found the root cause. In the `gradlew` script, line 8:

```bash
DEFAULT_JVM_OPTS='"-Xmx64m" "-Xms64m"'
```

The inner double quotes are literal characters. When `$DEFAULT_JVM_OPTS` is expanded unquoted on line 35, the JVM receives `"-Xmx64m"` with literal quote characters — which it interprets as a class name, not a JVM flag. The same issue exists in `gradlew.bat`.
